name: causal-order
description: An event integrity library for ordering and analyzing distributed events without false certainty.
author: Gazali Ahmad

scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run bench:check
scripts.bench: npm run build && node perf/run.mjs --profile baseline-100k-shuffled
scripts.bench:stream: npm run build && node perf/run.mjs --profile streaming-100k-plateaus
scripts.bench:csv: npm run build && node perf/run.mjs --all --out perf/results/latest.csv
scripts.bench:stream:cycles: npm run build && node perf/endurance.mjs --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag --repeat 12
scripts.bench:stream:long: npm run build && node perf/endurance.mjs --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag --duration-ms 60000
